name: Belc CO., LTD.
summary: Belc CO., LTD. manages a chain of food supermarkets. The company offers vegetables and fruits; sweets and desserts; meat and processed meat products; seafood products, eggs and dairy products; and processed and frozen food products, as well as beverages and liquor. It also provides clothing and housing products; agricultural, water, and livestock products; and chemical fertilizers, antibiotics, and synthetic additives under the TOPVALU brand name. The company was founded in 1959 and is headquartered in Tsurugashima, Japan.
